name: spark-stepwise-reward-modeling
description: Process-aware reward modeling for reference-free reinforcement learning
content:
## SPARK: Stepwise Process-Aware Rewards

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.03244 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.03244

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
